title: elaeocarpus trichanthera
intro: Elaeocarpus trichanthera, also known as the Borneo blue fig or blue satinash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. The medicinal properties of Elaeocarpus trichanthera lie in its berries, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory problems, due to their high content of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus trichanthera berries include their potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Elaeocarpus trichanthera berries are typically made by infusing the berries in hot water or using them in traditional remedies, such as decoctions and infusions, to harness their medicinal properties.
